text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a fan event being held today in the
lead-up to the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A huge, once-in-a-decade movement is taking
place in the Umamusume world this year.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Ooh, it's her. That's Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Whoa, she looks intense...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are people scared of me? But why?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: It's Oguri Cap! She's here!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: O-gu-ri! O-gu-ri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What's happening?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
If you'll allow me to begin, let's start with the
red-hot Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
How does it feel to race with such a monumental
obstacle, Oguri Cap the "Hero," standing in your
way?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Obstacle? Hero?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um, I'll do my best? Is that good enough?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
And over here, we have Oguri Cap charging in to
attack from the countryside! You're already a
national superstar.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
Fall is finally upon us. Can you hear the cheers
from your fans?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I hear them. When I'm not asleep, that is.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: O-gu-ri! O-gu-ri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hold on... Are you telling me that everyone sees
me as the villain?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel it from the crowds in the stands... Oguri
Cap's popularity is out of this world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek might be playing the antihero in this
story.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's almost like that time at the spring Classics.
Everyone was so cold and distant because I was
ill.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Actually... could you leave this to me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I've got an idea of my own. I'll try saying it in
front of everyone. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everyone! If you think Oguri's the strongest
around, then you're sorely mistaken! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I, Super Creek, along with my trainer, will knock
Oguri down a peg at the autumn Tenno Sho! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. You'll make a worthy opponent, Super
Creek.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's throw everything we have at each other. But
I won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: O-gu-ri! O-gu-ri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Super Creek where her confident outburst
came from.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Umm, it kind of occurred to me that saying things
like that would make everyone happy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to do that for them since I love making
everyone smile.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And if I can do that through racing, then I don't
mind taking a bit of flak.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have the composure during my bad spell,
but I can handle it now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Especially since you've built me up so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's decided to play the villain for her fans—the
kindest villain in the world.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um, also... Would you mind playing the villain
with me? And then...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's finish the race with a result so great that
everyone can't help but to detest us. It won't be
exciting unless we're formidable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek plans to envelop Oguri's
unprecedented popularity with her nurturing love.
